# Transcrição: Update_Your_Assumptions

- **Fonte:** Update_Your_Assumptions
- **Duração:** 01:33
- **Idioma:** en

## [00:00 - 01:33]

This is a pubcast shot. I'm John Loomer. And today we're going to talk about how you need to update your assumptions over time. Let's go. If you're an advertiser, challenge yourself to update your assumptions. I get it. We've all found an efficient system that works for us over the years. We've isolated those things that work and don't work. But if you never update those assumptions, you're going to create some problems for yourself. Things change. How advertising works and optimizes changes. You'll need to change too. Prime example is broad targeting. It wasn't long ago that the idea of removing all targeting would have been insane to me. I was a huge believer in micro targeting and isolating your ideal audience. But things change. It often makes sense to go broad now. The same goes for using placements. Like many advertisers, I'd remove the placements I didn't think would work. But as long as you optimize for a conversion, the algorithm has become super smart. If you remove placements, you're likely to spend less efficiently. And it took me some time to figure this out. Don't get stuck in your ways. Be willing to update your assumptions and evolve. So this shot was taken directly from a video I did on TikTok. If you're not already following me on TikTok, do so at John Loomer. You can also keep following me here. Don't forget to subscribe, rate and review. Until next time, do awesome things. I'm out.
